ValueSet-IMMZ.D.DE232.title: IMMZ.D.DE232 ValueSet for Type of meningococcal dose Schema
ValueSet-IMMZ.D.DE232.description: JSON Schema for IMMZ.D.DE232 ValueSet for Type of meningococcal dose ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
ValueSet-IMMZ.D.DE232.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZ.D.DE232 ValueSet for Type of meningococcal dose ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZ.D.DE232.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
